title: Card payments timed out during checkout
summary: Customers could not complete card payments because payment-service calls to the external provider timed out.
rootCause: External payment provider latency exceeded payment-service timeout thresholds.
remediation: Check payment provider status page and latency metrics
Inspect payment-service timeout and retry logs
Temporarily route traffic to fallback provider if available

title: Reporting queries saturated database CPU
summary: Response time for /payments/create increased because reporting-service long-running queries saturated PostgreSQL CPU.
rootCause: Reporting-service analytical queries put extra load on the database used by payment traffic.
remediation: Inspect top database queries and CPU metrics
Check reporting-service query volume and long-running query logs
Temporarily pause or throttle expensive reporting jobs

title: SMTP delivery failures delayed top-up confirmations
summary: Users did not receive top-up confirmation emails even though money was credited successfully.
rootCause: Notification-service had intermittent connection errors to the external SMTP provider.
remediation: Check notification-service SMTP connection error logs
Validate SMTP provider status and connection limits
Replay failed confirmation email jobs after delivery recovers

title: Authentication token validation returned 401
summary: Customers and merchants received 401 responses because auth-service rejected valid access tokens.
rootCause: Token signing key rotation propagated to token issuers before validators refreshed their key cache.
remediation: Check auth-service key cache refresh status
Compare issuer and validator key identifiers
Roll back signing key or force validator cache refresh
